name: canva-linux
description: A community open-source desktop wrapper for use with Canva
author: Community

scripts.dist:appimage: npm run build:runtime && NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish=never
scripts.build:scripts-core: esbuild scripts/core/action-registry.ts scripts/core/action-runner.ts scripts/core/validate-actions.ts scripts/core/overview-status.ts scripts/core/check-ai-guardrails.ts scripts/core/check-no-shell-menu.ts scripts/core/check-sudo-contract.ts scripts/core/check-action-contract.ts scripts/core/check-detection-contract.ts scripts/core/check-version-consistency.ts scripts/core/check-review-checklist.ts scripts/core/check-shell-action-ids.ts scripts/core/check-doc-links.ts scripts/core/check-dependency-policy.ts scripts/core/check-runtime-build.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outdir=.build/scripts/core
scripts.check:scripts-core: npm run build:scripts-core && node .build/scripts/core/validate-actions.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-no-shell-menu.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-sudo-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-action-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-detection-contract.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-version-consistency.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-review-checklist.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-shell-action-ids.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-doc-links.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-dependency-policy.js && node .build/scripts/core/check-runtime-build.js
